issue_title: Problem with Object Id and Type Id as Wrapper Object (regression in 2.5.1)
issue_description:
(note: originally from FasterXML/jackson-module-jaxb-annotations#51)
Looks like fix for #669 caused a regression for the special use case of combining type and object ids, with wrapper-object type id inclusion. The problem started with 2.5.1.

com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.jsontype..error_msg:

  "computers" : [ {
    "desktop" : {
      "id" : "computer-1",
      "location" : "Bangkok"
    }
  }, {

      "id" : "computer-2",
      "location" : "Pattaya"
    }
  }, {
    "laptop" : {
      "id" : "computer-3",
      "vendor" : "Apple"
    }
  } ]

buggy_code_comment:
/**
* Method that handles type information wrapper, locates actual
* subtype deserializer to use, and calls it to do actual
* deserialization.
*/
